page_content:
COMM436 Interpersonal Arguing (3 Credits)

An examination of face to face arguing. Prerequisite: COMM400 and COMM250. Restriction: Must be in Communication program. Credit Only Granted for. COMM436 or COMM498I. Formerly: COMM498I.

COMM448 Special Topics in Public Relations (3 Credits)

Courses seek to examine historical and current communication management theories, literature and practices for the purposes of understanding the business environment in which public relations/ communication management operates and applying the best of these theories and practices toward the management of the public relations/ communications functions of an organization.
